snippet.title: NRF Foundation Honors 2023 - Lowe's Chairman and CEO Marvin Ellison is The Visionary 2023
snippet.description:
The Visionary 2023 – Lowe's Chairman and CEO Marvin Ellison – delivered remarks onstage January 15 at the NRF Foundation Honors, presented by American Express and PwC. Mr. Ellison's children presented him with the award.
https://nrffoundation.org/honors/honorees/visionary

snippet.title: Lowe's CEO Marvin Ellison talks about climbing the corporate ladder
snippet.description:
At NRF 2023: Retail's Big Show, Lowe's Companies Inc. Chairman and CEO Marvin Ellison reflects on how his career path was only made possible with the help of others. He spoke with NRF President and CEO Matthew Shay about his vision for the future of retail and Lowe’s role in bringing it to life through investing in programs that empower young leaders and expand access to opportunity.

To learn more, visit: https://nrfbigshow.nrf.com/

snippet.title: Apostle Gino Jennings - Dancing in the Church | How Church People Should Dance For God
snippet.description:
In this thought-provoking video, we delve into the fascinating world of worship practices, where tradition meets modernity, and devotion takes center stage. Join us as we navigate the intricate balance between age-old customs and contemporary expressions of faith.


Renowned speaker and spiritual leader, Apostle Gino Jennings, lends his insights to this discussion base on scripture. shedding light on the evolving landscape of worship in today's churches. With his deep understanding of theology and a wealth of experience, Apostle Gino Jennings explains how some churches have embraced elements of hip-hop culture within their worship practices. Through captivating demonstrations, he showcases both the potential benefits and challenges of incorporating modern dance and music into traditional worship settings.


But this video goes beyond the surface, aiming to uncover the true essence of worship. We'll explore how worship extends far beyond mere rituals and routines. It's about forging a profound connection with the divine, reflecting on sacred teachings, and fostering personal growth. Apostle Gino Jennings emphasizes the importance of maintaining authenticity and reverence in worship, regardless of the styles employed.


As we delve into this insightful conversation, we'll also examine the impact of worship on individuals and communities. From cultivating humility and unity among believers to inspiring acts of kindness and service, true worship has a transformative power that extends far beyond the walls of a church.


Whether you're a believer seeking a deeper understanding of worship or simply curious about the intersections of tradition and modernity, this video offers a unique perspective that encourages reflection, discussion, and a renewed sense of devotion. Join us on this journey as we explore worship in all its diverse and meaningful forms.
